framework.name: Network as Gatekeeper
framework.description: As payment networks embed decision logic (what transactions are 'in bounds'), they become adjudicators rather than neutral infrastructure. Agent transactions are permitted or denied based on network rules, not just account balance. This centralizes control even in seemingly autonomous systems.
framework.raw_quote: If the network decides a transaction is out of bounds for your AI, it simply doesn't happen. No appeal, no explanation.
